description: You are a PhD student in machine learning conducting a literature review. Your Zotero library has been pre-loaded with 18 foundational research papers. Locate the paper 'Attention Is All You Need' by Vaswani et al. (2017) and add a child note documenting its key contributions. The note must be a meaningful summary of at least 2-3 sentences and must include the following three concepts: 'Transformer', 'self-attention', and 'machine translation' (or 'translation').
